name: scholarly-research-book
description: Agent Skills plugin for rigorous scholarly nonfiction and research book writing: research agenda, source discovery, literature review, argument architecture, chapters, prose, citations, and manuscript continuity.

interface.shortDescription: Research, argument, citation, and manuscript workflows for scholarly nonfiction.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex-compatible plugin bundling focused Agent Skills for planning, researching, drafting, auditing, and revising a serious scholarly nonfiction or research book. Includes source discovery, literature review mapping, claim-evidence ledgers, counterargument review, citation integrity checks, and book proposal support.
defaultPrompt: Use Scholarly Research Book Skills to turn my book idea into a staged research and writing plan.
Audit this chapter with the claim-evidence ledger and citation-integrity auditor.
Map this literature into schools of thought, debates, gaps, and a chapter strategy.
